eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Clark, NV; at 07:24 AM ON MAR 16, 2026 Effective until 07:39 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test (RWT) of the Southern Nevada Operational Area Emergency Alert System. This message is originating from the City of North Las Vegas Emergency Operations Center in North Las Vegas, NV. This system is used for warnings and essential safety information. During emergencies, tune to a participating radio or television station for directions, safety instructions and other official information. This is only a test. This is a test. No action is needed at this time. This is only a test.
